title: Webinar - Is Your SMS and Multichannel Messaging GDPR-Compliant?
excerpt: On the 3rd of October, Omnitas is excited to host a compelling webinar featuring our CRO Fredrik Kastenholm in conversation with Tristan Jülich and Viktor Anagrius from LINK Mobility, Europe’s top mobile messaging soluti…

posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
On the 3rd of October, Omnitas is excited to host a compelling webinar featuring our CRO Fredrik Kastenholm in conversation with Tristan Jülich and Viktor Anagrius from LINK Mobility, Europe’s top mobile messaging solutions provider.

Webinar Marketing1200×700 351 KB

In this session, we’ll dive into the critical aspects of ensuring your SMS and multichannel messaging strategies are both GDPR-compliant and secure. Tristan Jülich, a Sales Account Manager at LINK Mobility, will share his expertise in mobile messaging, marketing automation, and omnichannel communication. Meanwhile, Viktor Anagrius, an experienced Partner Manager, will provide valuable insights into building effective partnerships within the mobile communications landscape.

Join us for this invaluable opportunity to learn from industry leaders and enhance the compliance and effectiveness of your communication strategies.

Register now to secure your spot!

REGISTER HERE!
